_comment: Round ledger derived from BOTH OP post bodies AND visual inspection of the round-42 map. Each entry's empire_root is the FINAL empire the eliminated state ended up in (per visual ground truth from round 42), not necessarily the immediate absorber in that round. This yields a merger tree whose composition exactly matches the visual map. Source codes: body=parsed from OP post body; image=visually verified on the round-42 map; multi=multi-empire split, primary listed.

rounds.note: Initial 50-state map; no elimination.
Body says eaten by GA/AL; the FL region on round-42 is lavender (NM bloc), so FL's final empire is NM.
Body says eaten by neighbours; round-42 image shows ID as light purple = Cascadia (OR).
Body says NM/OK/LA primary; round-42 image: TX region lavender = NM.
Body: ND won. Round-42: SD region mid-blue = CO bloc (Colorado later absorbed ND's territory).
Body: demolished by VA/KY/OH/MD/PA. Round-42: WV region teal = MD bloc.
Body: eaten by neighbours. Round-42: NE region mid-blue = CO.
Body: eaten by friends in the South. Round-42: SC region teal = MD.
Body: Arkansas is no more. Round-42: AR region lavender = NM.
Body: Ohio is gone. Round-42: OH region medium green = MI (Michigan bloc absorbed OH).
Body: RI gone. Round-42: RI region navy = VT (Vermomster).
Body: ND landmass to surrounding states. Round-42: ND region lime green = MN.
Body: NJ gone. Round-42: NJ region navy = VT.
Body: primarily TN with GA/MS contributions. Round-42: AL region lavender = NM (TN's empire eventually absorbed into NM bloc).
Body: Missouri GONE. Round-42: MO region lavender = NM.
Body: eaten by LA and GA. Round-42: MS region lavender = NM (via LA).
Body: Indiana gone. Round-42: IN region medium green = MI.
Body: NH gone. Round-42: NH region navy = VT.
Body: Oklahoma officially gone. Round-42: OK region lavender = NM.
Body: Delaware fully gone. Round-42: DE region teal = MD.
Body: Alaska eaten by Hawaii. Round-42 inset: AK same blue as HI.
Body: Utah; greedy neighbours. Round-42: UT region mid-blue = CO.
Body: Connecticut cut. Round-42: CT region navy = VT.
Body: Wyoming gone. Round-42: WY region mid-blue = CO.
Body: IOWA IS GONE. Round-42: IA region lime green = MN.
Body: primarily PA with TN/IL nibbles. Round-42: western KY region medium green = MI (Michigan bloc took the bulk).
Body: Louisiana gone; forfeit to NM. Round-42: LA region lavender = NM.
Body: TN succumbs. Round-42: TN region medium green = MI bloc (note: my earlier guess of PA was wrong).
Body: Maine to Vermont. Round-42: ME region navy = VT.
Body: Georgia demolished. Round-42: GA region lavender = NM (note: my earlier guess of MD was wrong — NM actually absorbed GA).
Body: Nevada gone. Round-42: NV region mid-blue = CO.
Body: Confederate-states; NC chosen. Round-42: NC region teal = MD.
Body: AZ to NME and CA. Round-42: AZ region lavender = NM.
Body: Maryland eats VA. Round-42: VA region teal = MD.
Body: Vermonster and Massivechusetts. Round-42: NY region navy = VT.
Body: WA merged into OR -> Cascadia. Round-42: WA region light purple = OR.
Body: MA merged into VT -> Vermomster. Round-42: MA region navy = VT.
Body: Kansas. Round-42: KS region mid-blue = CO.
Body: MT swallowed by neighbours. Round-42: MT region light purple = OR (Cascadia bloc — note: my earlier guess of MN was wrong).
Body: CA split among HI/CO/NM/Cascadia. Round-42: central CA region mid-blue = CO (the largest contiguous slice — southern CA is HI's blue, northern is Cascadia).
Body: Illinois eaten. Round-42: IL region medium green = MI.
Body: Maryland crab eats PA. Round-42: PA region teal = MD.
